title: presenting-with-html content contract
description: Input to scripts/build_html.py. Write ONLY this file; the builder owns the HTML shell, CSS, navigation JS, and class vocabulary. The same checks are enforced by the builder itself with actionable messages — this schema is the documentation of record. See examples/deck-content.json and examples/report-content.json for complete working inputs.

format.description: deck = full-screen slides with navigation; report = long-form scrolling document with TOC + print styles.

style.description: Visual preset: boardroom = dark-first flat corporate; clean = light-first flat corporate, print-oriented; executive = light-first editorial serif, annual-report look. Default boardroom. CLI --style overrides.

brand.description: Brand pack name under brands/ or a path to a client pack kept outside the repo. CLI --brand overrides.

branding.description: OPTIONAL inline branding, deep-merged over the brand pack — the low-friction path when the user hands over a logo/colors in-conversation. Every element collapses cleanly when absent (no logo -> no logo chip; no footer strings -> no footer line).

logo.description: Path to a png/svg/jpg, relative to this content JSON (or absolute). Embedded base64 at build time.

colors.description: Any of primary/dark/accent/accent_2/alert/ink/muted/bg/panel/hairline as hex strings. Theme token sets and chart colors re-derive automatically.

meta.description: Drives the auto-generated title slide (deck) / hero section (report). Do not add a title block yourself.

title_accent.description: Optional substring of title rendered in the gradient accent.

eyebrow.description: Small uppercase kicker above the title, e.g. 'Executive Review · Q3 2026'.

lead.description: One- or two-sentence framing paragraph under the title.

slides.description: Deck only. Body slides — the title slide is generated from meta.

sections.description: Report only. Body sections — the hero is generated from meta. Each may set 'toc' for its contents-panel label (defaults to the heading).

down.description: true renders the delta in the negative color.

chart.description: Either the simple spec (chart_type/categories/series — converted to theme-aware Plotly that restyles on theme toggle) or a raw passthrough {plotly:{data,layout}}.

sub_block.description: A column inside two-col. Same shapes as the top-level blocks, no heading required.

src.description: image: path relative to the content JSON

sub.description: Muted secondary line under the bullet.

block.description: One slide (deck) or one section (report). 'section' dividers are deck-only.

heading.description: Required for every type except kpi, quote, and image (optional there).

cards.description: cards / closing. 3-column grid of highlight cards.

big.description: Large figure at the card's foot.

rows.description: table body; each row must match columns' length

body.description: chart/table: analysis paragraph under the visual.

milestones.description: timeline: one entry per milestone/phase, in order

label.description: small kicker, e.g. a month or phase number

src.description: image: path to png/jpg/svg, relative to this content JSON. Embedded base64 (self-contained).

caption.description: image: small caption under the figure

style.description: callout: box kind. Sets the label (overridable via heading) and the accent (action/warning = red).

people.description: team: one card per person; photo is embedded base64, else an initials avatar renders

photo.description: path relative to the content JSON

image_side.description: feature: which side the image sits on (default right)
